org.exist.xmlrpc
Class RpcConnection

java.lang.Object
  java.lang.Thread
      org.exist.xmlrpc.RpcConnection
All Implemented Interfaces:
java.lang.Runnable
public class RpcConnection
extends java.lang.Thread

This class implements the actual methods defined by RpcAPI.

Author:
Wolfgang Meier (wolfgang@exist-db.org)

parseLocal

public boolean parseLocal(User user,
                          java.lang.String localFile,
                          java.lang.String docName,
                          boolean replace)
                   throws EXistException,
                          PermissionDeniedException,
                          LockException,
                          org.xml.sax.SAXException,
                          TriggerException
Parse a file previously uploaded with upload. The temporary file will be removed.

Parameters:
user -
localFile -
Throws:
EXistException
java.io.IOException
PermissionDeniedException
LockException
org.xml.sax.SAXException
TriggerException
